import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import Logo from '../components/Logo'; const FEATURES = [ { icon:'🔍', color:'var(--gold-dim)', title:'Instant RC & Owner Verification', desc:'Cross-check registration, ownership history, and RTO records directly from VAHAN database in real-time.' }, { icon:'🚨', color:'var(--red-dim)', title:'Challan & Legal History', desc:'Find all pending and paid challans from eChallan portal. Know all legal liabilities before money changes hands.' }, { icon:'💰', color:'var(--green-dim)',title:'AI Price Fairness Engine', desc:'Our algorithm compares asking price against 50,000+ real-time transactions to tell you if you are overcharged.' }, { icon:'⚙️', color:'var(--blue-dim)', title:'Engine Health Score', desc:'Detailed engine, transmission, body, and interior condition scores so you know exactly what you are buying.' }, { icon:'📋', color:'var(--gold-dim)', title:'Full Accident History', desc:'Check for accident records, flood damage, salvage title, and blacklisting across national databases.' }, { icon:'🤖', color:'var(--green-dim)',title:'AI-Powered Verdict', desc:'Get a plain-language recommendation with negotiation tips so you can confidently make your offer.' }, ]; const STATS = [['2.4M+','Vehicles Verified'],['98.7%','Accuracy Rate'],['₹340Cr+','Fraud Prevented'],['4.9★','User Rating']]; export default function Landing() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [showTeamModal, setShowTeamModal] = useState(false); const [showTeamSection, setShowTeamSection] = useState(false); return (
{/* BG Effects */}
{/* Nav */}
{['How It Works','Features','Pricing'].map(l => ( e.currentTarget.style.color='var(--gold)'} onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.color='var(--text2)'}>{l} ))} setShowTeamModal(true)} style={{ color:'var(--gold)', fontSize:14, fontWeight:600, cursor:'pointer', transition:'color 0.2s' }} onMouseEnter={e=>e.currentTarget.style.color='var(--gold2)'} onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.color='var(--gold)'}>👥 Team Roles
{/* Hero */}
India's Most Trusted Vehicle Verification Platform

Know the Truth
Before You Buy

Instant used car verification — engine health, challan history, accident records, price fairness, and AI-powered verdict in seconds.

{/* Stats */}
{STATS.map(([num,label]) => (
{num}
{label}
))}
{/* Platform Overview */}

Complete Vehicle Intelligence
Simplified For Everyone

Buying a pre-owned vehicle in India has historically been filled with uncertainty. Between hidden structural damages, odometer tampering, outstanding court cases, and unfair pricing, buyers face massive risks.

AutoVerify aggregates millions of data points instantly. By bridging direct connections to government registries, national crime databases, transport directories, and legal courts, we map out the complete history of any vehicle. Supported by our trained machine learning models, we analyze pricing trends and technical condition scores to put you in complete control.

📊
Proprietary Index
Multi-factored scoring grading overall structural, legal, and financial status.
⚖️
Absolute Compliance
100% compliant and secure platform pulling original registered datasets.
{/* Dashboard Preview Card */}
Sample Analysis Check

Honda City ZX i-VTEC

92 Trust Score
✓ RTO Registration GENUINE MATCH
✓ Financial Encumbrances NO LOAN DETECTED
✓ Pending Traffic Fines 2 PAID · 0 PENDING
✓ Market Price Fairness FAIR BUYING VALUE
✓ Blacklist & Theft Check CLEAN REGISTRY
🤖
AI Recommendation: Strong purchase. Highly competitive asking price with outstanding mechanical grades.
{/* How it Works Section */}
Simple Verification Process

How AutoVerify Works

01
⌨️

Enter Vehicle Number

Provide the state-registered license plate code of any car or two-wheeler. Our system natively processes registrations across all Indian states and Union Territories.

02
⚡

Real-Time Scanning

AutoVerify establishes direct secure tunnels to central government registries (VAHAN), municipal traffic courts, insurance agencies, and pricing indexes to build a complete profile.

03
📈

Interactive Verdict

Access an easy-to-read diagnostic breakdown including legal blacklists, pricing ranges, transmission scores, accident data, and a plain-language summary with negotiation pointers.
